ads.author: Michael Bucholtz
ads.title: Golden Tee Tournament Edition Arcade Machine – Original Cabinet tested fully working
ads.description: Currently in my storage unit in Leesburg. We would meet there. Fully tested and working. Golden Tee Tournament Edition arcade machine by Incredible Technologies. Original full-size arcade cabinet with trackball controls, coin door, CRT monitor, and game board still installed. Cabinet appears largely complete but has been in storage and is being sold as-is, untested. Features: Original Golden Tee Tournament Edition artwork Full-size stand-up arcade cabinet Trackball control panel Coin door and coin mechanisms present CRT monitor installed Original game board appears present inside cabinet Great restoration project or man-cave/game room piece Condition: Fully functional Dusty from storage Cabinet has cosmetic wear, chips, and scratches

ads.author: Julian Nygren
ads.title: Pending - SNK Street Smart dedicated arcade machine - working
ads.description: Original dedicated SNK Street Smart arcade machine. Game is working and in overall good condition, but could still use a little bit of TLC. Excellent lite project. Little to no water damage, has some damage on the edges, but it overall pretty decent. I've done some work to it, but selling for what I have into it to make room for other projects. Comes with back door, and I can install new locks if needed. $325, located in Ranburne AL.

ads.author: Shannon Brummitt
ads.title: Barrington Roll and Score Arcade Game
ads.description: Classic arcade-style skee-ball game has a dark blue and wood-grain finish. This Barrington Billiards Company unit features an electronic LED scoreboard (needs batteries or may have a short somewhere) and a ball return system. The game includes three yellow balls. There is visible wear and chipping on the wood-grain laminate near the ball return area.

ads.author: Richard Thompson
ads.title: PAC MAN MONITOR GLASS BEZEL ONLY $50 OBO!
ads.description: This PAC MAN MONITOR GLASS BEZEL is a collectible replacement part for an arcade gaming machine, specifically designed for the game Pac-Man. Produced by Bally Midway, this bezel adds a sleek and authentic touch to the monitor of a vintage arcade game, enhancing the overall gaming experience for enthusiasts. Perfect for restoring or customizing a classic arcade machine, this PAC MAN MONITOR GLASS BEZEL is a must-have for collectors and gamers looking to preserve the nostalgia ... See more

ads.author: Clayton Lacey
ads.title: Atari Hard Drivin upright project working needs cabinet repair no trades
ads.description: This is a project I am willing to pass on to anyone who wants to restore it. Monitor chassis recapped the tube is original with burn in on screen text and gauges only the text is noticeable during gameplay. The bad the base of the seat and cabinet need repaired or replacing so listing as a project that works and plays the switch on third gear is flaky so currently disabled in settings. No back door or monitor door on the top. No trades.
